Patient Summary

Susan Frances Martin, born on 09/03/1951, is a 74-year-old female patient. Her medical
journey includes management of Osteoarthritis. She has a history of regular hospital visits
for check-ups and treatments related to her condition. Her current health status is stable
with ongoing management and monitoring of her symptoms.
